title: ephemerantha flabelliformis
intro: Ephemerantha flabelliformis, also known as the Flabellate Orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, headache, and respiratory problems, due to its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of the Ephemerantha flabelliformis plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often consumed to reap its health benefits, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
